Writeups

  • No writeups match this tag.
  • Jul 2026 Bitstream - Full Guide and Writeup Full internal AD compromise: stored XSS → IDOR → MSSQL RCE → SeImpersonate (GodPotato) → Kerberoasting → GenericAll abuse → DCSync to Domain Admin. Challenge AD Web App Attack IDOR Kerberoasting
  • Jul 2026 Lumons Hack Smarter - Concise Writeup Medium-rated Active Directory box - foothold to domain compromise on the Hack Smarter platform. AD Challenge
  • Jun 2026 Guided Lab: Bloodhound Walking BloodHound's attack-path graphs - collection, Cypher queries, and reading edges to find the route to Domain Admin. Guided Lab
  • Jun 2026 Intro to Kerberos Roasting & Active Directory Abuse Kerberoasting explained end to end - how the protocol is abused, how to identify and crack roastable accounts, and why it works. Guided Lab Kerberoasting
  • Jun 2026 Challenge Lab: Arasaka (Easy) Clean walkthrough of the Arasaka box on Hack Smarter. Challenge
